tags.name: Solo-friendly
tags.description: Comfortable and enjoyable for solo travelers.

tags.name: Couple-friendly
tags.description: Ideal for couples or romantic trips.

tags.name: Cultural
tags.description: Offers cultural insight, heritage, or traditions.

tags.name: Adventurous
tags.description: Involves physical activity, exploration, or adventure.

tags.name: Romantic
tags.description: Atmospheric and appealing for romantic moments.

tags.name: Educational
tags.description: Provides learning opportunities or educational value.

tags.name: Tourist Hotspot
tags.description: Very popular and frequently visited by tourists.

tags.name: Hidden Gem
tags.description: Less-known but highly rewarding to visit.

tags.name: Crowded
tags.description: Often busy or crowded, especially during peak times.

tags.name: Good for Short Visits
tags.description: Can be enjoyed in a short amount of time.

tags.name: Good for Long Stays
tags.description: Worth spending extended time at or nearby.

tags.name: Language Barrier Friendly
tags.description: Easy to navigate without knowing the local language.

tags.name: Best in Morning
tags.description: Most enjoyable when visited in the morning.

tags.name: Seasonal
tags.description: Best during specific seasons or times of year.

tags.name: Food-focused
tags.description: Strong emphasis on food and dining.

tags.name: Nightlife
tags.description: Strong nightlife or evening activity appeal.
